case_title: PATELCO CREDIT UNION VS MARYVIC BALLARD.

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MARYVIC BALLARD. HEARING SET FOR AUG-08-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT OF AUG-08-1996, GRANTED
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT RETURNED INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO MERCED COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MARYVIC BALLARD.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,547.82 FILED BY PATELCO CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT MARYVIC BALLARD. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATELCO CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARYVIC BALLARD. $1,429.00 PRINCIPAL, $66.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,495.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
